## Summary

Describe the change in one or two sentences.

## Governance Impact

- [ ] Ownership or review expectations remain correct
- [ ] Documentation was updated if behavior or process changed
- [ ] No secrets or personal credentials were added
- [ ] Tests were added or updated where appropriate
- [ ] CI passes for this change

## Validation

List the commands or checks you ran locally.

## Rollback Notes

Describe how to revert this change if it causes issues after merge.
